A2123_CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD Current Reconciled Medication List - Ptnt (Dis) Indicates whether, at the time of discharge, the current facility provided the patient’s current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver. 0. No– Current reconciled medication list not provided to the patient, family and/or caregiver
1. Yes – Current
